channel.title: VulnCheck — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by VulnCheck (vulncheck).

item.title: CVE-2026-61520 · 7.7 HIGH — Simple Machines Forum SSRF via image proxy
item.description: Simple Machines Forum 2.1 prior to commit 4bf35cf and 3.0 prior to commit b4d23df contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability in the image proxy that allows authenticated attackers to trigger internal HTTP requests by embedding attacker-cont…

item.title: CVE-2026-60119 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Hi.Events < 1.11.0 XSS via Event Title JSON.stringify Injection
item.description: Hi.Events before 1.11.0 contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers with event creation or edit permissions to inject arbitrary HTML and JavaScript by embedding a malicious event title containing the </script> se…

item.title: CVE-2026-60118 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Hi.Events < 1.11.0 Hidden Ticket Enumeration via Order Creation Endpoint
item.description: Hi.Events before 1.11.0 contains a missing server-side visibility enforcement vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to purchase hidden tickets by referencing hidden product and price IDs in order creation requests without authorization…

item.title: CVE-2026-58479 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sustainable Irrigation Platform 5.2.16 RCE via cli_control Plugin Command Injection
item.description: Sustainable Irrigation Platform (SIP) through version 5.2.16 contains a command injection vulnerability in the optional cli_control plugin that allows unauthenticated or cross-site request forgery attackers to execute arbitrary operating-system comma…

item.title: CVE-2026-58478 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Sustainable Irrigation Platform 5.2.16 SSRF via Node-RED Callback URL
item.description: Sustainable Irrigation Platform (SIP) through version 5.2.16 contains a server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to make the device issue arbitrary HTTP requests by supplying a malicious callback URL when…

item.title: CVE-2026-58477 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Sustainable Irrigation Platform 5.2.16 Mass Assignment via HTTP Parameters
item.description: Sustainable Irrigation Platform (SIP) through version 5.2.16 contains a mass assignment vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to overwrite sensitive configuration settings by supplying arbitrary parameter names in HTTP requests. Attacke…

item.title: CVE-2026-60114 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Sustainable Irrigation Platform 5.2.16 Path Traversal via JSON Backup Restore
item.description: Sustainable Irrigation Platform (SIP) through version 5.2.16 contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows attackers with access to the restore functionality to write files to arbitrary locations by uploading crafted JSON backup files with unva…

item.title: CVE-2026-58476 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Sustainable Irrigation Platform 5.2.16 CSRF via Administrative GET Requests
item.description: Sustainable Irrigation Platform (SIP) through version 5.2.16 contains a cross-site request forgery vulnerability that allows remote attackers to perform state-changing administrative actions by luring a logged-in administrator into visiting a malicio…

item.title: CVE-2026-58475 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Sustainable Irrigation Platform 5.2.16 Stored XSS via Program Name
item.description: Sustainable Irrigation Platform (SIP) through version 5.2.16 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary JavaScript by supplying malicious script payloads within program names submitt…

item.title: CVE-2026-57856 · 8.8 HIGH — Cockpit CMS Path Traversal via Bucket Name in Bucket File Storage API
item.description: Cockpit CMS contains a path traversal vulnerability in the Bucket file storage API (/system/buckets/api). The api() method in modules/System/Controller/Buckets.php sanitizes the bucket name with preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9-_\\.]/','', $bucket), which…

item.title: CVE-2026-57855 · 8.8 HIGH — Cockpit CMS Missing Authorization in Bucket File Storage API
item.description: Cockpit CMS contains a missing authorization vulnerability in the Bucket file storage API (/system/buckets/api). The api() method in modules/System/Controller/Buckets.php executes bucket commands (ls, upload, removefiles, rename, createfolder) withou…

item.title: CVE-2026-62328 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — 9Router 0.4.41 - Unauthenticated Information Disclosure via API Usage Endpoints
item.description: 9Router through version 0.4.41 contain an unauthenticated information disclosure vulnerability that allows remote attackers to access sensitive user data by sending requests to unprotected API endpoints. Attackers can enumerate paginated request logs…

item.title: CVE-2026-62327 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — 9Router 0.4.41 - Unauthenticated API Key Exposure via /api/usage/stats
item.description: 9Router through version 0.4.41 contains an unauthenticated information disclosure vulnerability that allows remote attackers to retrieve plaintext API keys for all connected AI provider accounts by sending a single unauthenticated request to the /api…

item.title: CVE-2026-62185 · 8.6 HIGH — Argo CD Helm Chart < 10.0.0 Missing Network Policy RCE
item.description: Argo CD Helm Chart before 10.0.0 fails to install network policies by default, allowing any pod on a cluster to access repo-server and other Argo APIs. Attackers can exploit this unrestricted network access through combined attacks to achieve cluster…

item.title: CVE-2026-62200 · 8.8 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.6.6 Authentication Bypass via Git ext transport
item.description: OpenClaw versions before 2026.6.6 contain a flaw in host exec environment filtering that could allow Git ext transport to be abused. When the affected feature is enabled and reachable, a lower-trust caller or configured input path could execute or pe…

item.title: CVE-2026-62199 · 8.8 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.6.6 Authentication Bypass via Environment Filtering
item.description: OpenClaw versions before 2026.6.6 contain a flaw in host exec environment filtering that can miss interpreter startup variables. When the affected feature is enabled and reachable, a lower-trust caller or configured input path can supply crafted envi…

item.title: CVE-2026-62198 · 5.3 MEDIUM — OpenClaw 2026.5.28 < 2026.6.6 Authorization Bypass via Web Search
item.description: OpenClaw versions 2026.5.28 before 2026.6.6 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability in native web search that allows lower-trust callers to perform actions requiring stronger policy checks. Attackers can exploit misconfigured input paths to byp…

item.title: CVE-2026-62197 · 8.5 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.6.6 Policy Bypass via CDP Discovery
item.description: OpenClaw before 2026.6.6 contains a policy bypass vulnerability in browser CDP discovery that accepts blocked WebSocket URLs. Attackers with lower-trust access can reach network destinations that should have been blocked by OpenClaw policy when the a…

item.title: CVE-2026-62196 · 8.7 HIGH — OpenClaw 2026.3.22 < 2026.6.6 Authorization Bypass via WhatsApp Group IDs
item.description: OpenClaw versions 2026.3.22 before 2026.6.6 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability where WhatsApp group IDs can satisfy elevated sender allowlists. Attackers with lower-trust access can perform actions requiring stronger authorization by lever…

item.title: CVE-2026-62195 · 8.7 HIGH — OpenClaw 2026.5.20 < 2026.6.6 Authorization Bypass via MCP loopback
item.description: OpenClaw versions 2026.5.20 before 2026.6.6 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability in the MCP loopback feature that allows lower-trust callers to execute owner-only tools. Attackers can bypass authorization checks through configured input path…

item.title: CVE-2026-62194 · 8.8 HIGH — OpenClaw 2026.5.20 < 2026.6.9 Privilege Escalation via Plugin Install
item.description: OpenClaw versions 2026.5.20 before 2026.6.9 contain a privilege escalation vulnerability in plugin install commands that allows lower-trust callers to execute or persist actions beyond their intended authorization. Attackers can exploit misconfigured…

item.title: CVE-2026-62193 · 6.9 MEDIUM — OpenClaw 2026.6.5 < 2026.6.9 Authentication Bypass via Plugin Install
item.description: OpenClaw versions 2026.6.5 before 2026.6.9 contain a vulnerability in the plugin install wrappers that could skip the install policy (authorization) check. When the affected feature is enabled and reachable, a lower-trust caller or a configured input…

item.title: CVE-2026-62192 · 8.1 HIGH — OpenClaw 2026.6.6 < 2026.6.9 Authorization Bypass
item.description: OpenClaw versions 2026.6.6 before 2026.6.9 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability in Discord guild actions that allows lower-trust callers to perform actions requiring stronger authorization checks. Attackers can exploit misconfigured input pa…

item.title: CVE-2026-62191 · 7.1 HIGH — OpenClaw 2026.6.6 < 2026.6.9 Authorization Bypass via Message Mutations
item.description: OpenClaw versions 2026.6.6 before 2026.6.9 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability in message mutation handling that allows lower-trust callers to perform actions requiring stronger authorization checks. Attackers can exploit misconfigured inpu…

item.title: CVE-2026-62190 · 8.8 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.6.9 Authorization Bypass via flock wrapper
item.description: OpenClaw versions before 2026.6.9 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability in the flock wrapper that allows lower-trust callers to execute or persist actions beyond their intended authorization. Attackers can leverage configured input paths to b…

item.title: CVE-2026-62189 · 7.6 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.6.9 Symlink Following via Mirror Sync
item.description: OpenClaw versions before 2026.6.9 contain a symlink following vulnerability in the mirror sync feature that allows lower-trust callers to perform actions requiring stronger authorization. Attackers can exploit remote symlink parents to bypass policy…

item.title: CVE-2026-62188 · 8.6 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.6.9 Feishu Authorization Bypass
item.description: OpenClaw @openclaw/feishu versions 2026.6.6 and earlier contain an incorrect authorization vulnerability in which the Feishu permission tools could ignore per-account disablement settings. When the affected feature is enabled and reachable, a lower-t…

item.title: CVE-2026-62187 · 8.6 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.6.9 Feishu tools Authorization Bypass
item.description: OpenClaw Feishu tools (npm package @openclaw/feishu) in versions <= 2026.6.6 could ignore per-account disablement. A lower-trust caller or a configured input path could perform actions that should have required a stronger authorization or policy chec…

item.title: CVE-2026-62186 · 7.6 HIGH — OpenClaw < 2026.6.8 Authorization Bypass via HTTP Model Override
item.description: OpenClaw versions before 2026.6.8 contain an authorization bypass vulnerability in OpenAI-compatible HTTP model overrides that allows lower-trust callers to perform actions requiring stronger authorization checks. Attackers can exploit misconfigured…

item.title: CVE-2026-62184 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — luci-app-banip Log Monitor IP Extraction Bypass
item.description: luci-app-banip contains a log parsing vulnerability where the awk-based parser extracts the first IPv4 address from log lines regardless of field position, allowing attackers to inject arbitrary IPs via attacker-controlled fields like usernames. An u…

item.title: CVE-2026-61458 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — PasswordPusher < 2.9.2 Passphrase Brute-Force via Unthrottled Endpoint
item.description: PasswordPusher before 2.9.2 contains a brute-force vulnerability in the POST /p/:token/access endpoint that lacks route-specific rate limiting and per-push lockout mechanisms. Attackers who know a push token can systematically guess passphrases at 12…

item.title: CVE-2026-59801 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — 9Router 0.4.41 - Unauthenticated API Exposure via /api/providers
item.description: 9Router through version 0.4.41 contains an unauthenticated access vulnerability that allows remote attackers to interact with provider management API endpoints by sending requests without any credentials due to missing authentication middleware in th…

item.title: CVE-2026-62242 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Spring Boot Admin Server < 4.1.2 SSRF via Unauthenticated Instance Registration
item.description: Spring Boot Admin Server before 4.1.2 contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to register instances with attacker-controlled healthUrl and managementUrl parameters without validation against private…

item.title: CVE-2026-62240 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — CrewAI < 1.15.1 SSRF Filter Bypass via HTTP Redirect in Scrape Tools
item.description: CrewAI before 1.15.1 contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability in the validate_url function that performs one-shot DNS resolution and blocklist checks before returning the original URL unchanged. Attackers can bypass the security filter by…

item.title: CVE-2026-62239 · 6.6 MEDIUM — FlashAttention Symlink Attack via tarfile.extractall in hopper/setup.py
item.description: FlashAttention through 2.8.3.post1, fixed in commit 0816ef1, contains a symlink attack vulnerability in the download_and_copy() function within hopper/setup.py that extracts NVIDIA toolchain archives without validating symlinks or filtering tar membe…

item.title: CVE-2026-49972 · 8.8 HIGH — Laravel-Mediable < 7.0.0 File Upload RCE via Extension Bypass
item.description: Laravel-Mediable before 7.0.0 contains a file upload vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to achieve remote code execution by uploading a file with an embedded PHP extension disguised within a double extension such as shell.php.jpg. Th…

item.title: CVE-2026-49971 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Laravel-Mediable < 7.0.0 Stored XSS via SVG File Upload
item.description: Laravel-Mediable before 7.0.0 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated or anonymous users to execute arbitrary JavaScript by uploading unsanitized SVG files containing embedded scripts in onload event handlers, s…

item.title: CVE-2026-49970 · 8.8 HIGH — Laravel-Mediable < 7.0.0 Path Traversal via File::sanitizePath()
item.description: Laravel-Mediable before 7.0.0 contains a path traversal vulnerability in the File::sanitizePath() function that allows attackers to write uploaded files to arbitrary locations by controlling the directory argument passed to MediaUploader::toDestinati…

item.title: CVE-2026-49969 · 7.4 HIGH — Laravel-Mediable < 7.0.0 SSRF via RemoteUrlAdapter URL Handling
item.description: Laravel-Mediable before 7.0.0 contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability that allows remote attackers to issue arbitrary HTTP requests from the server by supplying unvalidated caller-controlled URLs to endpoints backed by MediaUploader::fro…

item.title: CVE-2026-60103 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Blender 3.0.0 - 5.1.2 Out-of-Bounds Read via crafted .blend SDNA block
item.description: Blender 3.0.0 through 5.1.2 contains an out-of-bounds read vulnerability that allows attackers to trigger a crash or read adjacent heap memory by supplying a crafted .blend file with a malicious signed short member_index value in the SDNA block. The…

item.title: CVE-2026-61505 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Rejetto HFS < 3.2.1 Limited File Disclosure via Path Traversal in lang Parameter
item.description: Rejetto HFS 3.0.0 through 3.2.0 allows path traversal through the lang query parameter, permitting a remote unauthenticated attacker to read certain JSON files outside the shared folders. Exploitation is constrained to files matching a narrow naming…

item.title: CVE-2026-61504 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Rejetto HFS < 3.2.1 Stored XSS via File Names in Basic Web Listing
item.description: Rejetto HFS 3.0.0 through 3.2.0 does not escape file names in its fallback "basic" web listing, and this listing can be forced by any browser via the ?get=basic parameter. A user with upload permission - or an anonymous user on servers with an open u…

item.title: CVE-2026-61503 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Rejetto HFS < 3.2.1 Username Enumeration via Login Response Differences
item.description: Rejetto HFS 3.0.0 through 3.2.0 returns observably different responses from its login endpoint depending on whether the submitted username exists. A remote unauthenticated attacker can use this to confirm valid account names, including the default ad…

item.title: CVE-2026-61502 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Rejetto HFS < 3.2.1 Cross-Site Request Forgery via GET Requests
item.description: Rejetto HFS 3.0.0 through 3.2.0 accepts state-changing API requests via the GET method and exempts GET requests from its anti-CSRF header check. A remote attacker can perform administrative actions including account creation and configuration changes…

item.title: CVE-2026-61463 · 8.8 HIGH — Shiori Authenticated Privilege Escalation via PATCH /api/v1/auth/account
item.description: Shiori contains a privilege escalation vulnerability in the account update endpoint that allows authenticated users to modify the owner field without authorization checks. Attackers can escalate to administrator by submitting a crafted PATCH request…

item.title: CVE-2026-61501 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Rejetto HFS < 3.2.1 Stored XSS in Admin Log Viewer
item.description: Rejetto HFS 3.0.0 through 3.2.0 renders log entries in the administration panel as HTML without sanitization. A remote unauthenticated attacker can submit a failed login with a crafted username that is written to the error log and executes JavaScript…

item.title: CVE-2026-61500 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Rejetto HFS < 3.2.1 Session Forgery via Predictable Signing Key
item.description: Rejetto HFS 3.0.0 through 3.2.0 derives its session-cookie signing key from the non-cryptographic Math.random() generator and discloses outputs of the same generator to unauthenticated clients during login. A remote attacker can collect a small numbe…

item.title: CVE-2026-61462 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — mcp-gitlab Path Traversal via job_id Parameter
item.description: mcp-gitlab contains a path traversal vulnerability in the job_id parameter of build/index.js that allows attackers to redirect GitLab API requests to arbitrary endpoints. Attackers can supply crafted job_id values like ../../../user to escape the int…

item.title: CVE-2026-61498 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Vitec Flamingo 4.12.2 Unauthenticated OS Command Injection via gen_graphs.php
item.description: Vitec Flamingo 4.12.2 contains an unauthenticated OS command injection vulnerability in the admin/ajax/gen_graphs.php endpoint that allows remote unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary commands by supplying shell metacharacters in the start,…

item.title: CVE-2026-60121 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Vitec Flamingo 4.12.2 Unauthenticated OS Command Injection via ping.php
item.description: Vitec Flamingo 4.12.2 contains an unauthenticated OS command injection vulnerability in the admin/ajax/ping.php endpoint that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands by exploiting a double-evaluation flaw in shell argument handling. The…
